title: Review clean architecture layers
description: Walk through domain, usecase, repository, controller, and route packages.

title: Configure MongoDB Atlas connection
description: Create a database user, allow the local IP address, and copy the connection string into .env.

title: Run todo API locally
description: Start the API with go run ./cmd and call the health endpoint.

title: Add request logging
description: Check storage/logs after making API requests.

title: Write first usecase tests
description: Mock the repository interface and verify create, update, and delete behavior.
